title: pedilonum calcarium
intro: Pedilonum calcarium, also known as the 'horseshoe plant' or 'saddle leaf', is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anthraquinone and tannin content. The health benefits of Pedilonum calcarium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural laxative. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate these symptoms.
